meta.title: Victor — FullStack Developer
meta.description: Engineering digital systems at stellar scale. Robust backends, cinematic frontends, secure architecture, and product-grade performance.

hero.subtitle: I build robust, scalable and secure digital systems — pairing backend depth with refined frontend execution, and an obsession with performance, architecture and product quality.

projects.title: Selected projects
projects.caption: Platforms and systems built with a focus on architecture, performance and reliability.

auth.title: Distributed Identity Platform
auth.summary: Unified authentication and authorization layer for multi-tenant products, with SSO, granular RBAC and real-time auditing.
auth.problem: Fragmented identity across services, with risk of permission leaks and weak observability.
auth.solution: Stateless auth core with rotating tokens, declarative policies and audit event streaming to a data lake.
auth.architecture: Edge gateway · Policy service · Event bus · Encrypted storage · Real-time audit console

analytics.title: Realtime Analytics Pipeline
analytics.summary: Event ingestion, processing and visualization at scale, with sub-second latency and exactly-once delivery guarantees.
analytics.problem: Stale dashboards and brittle pipelines prevented fast product decisions.
analytics.solution: Event-driven architecture with windowed processing, incremental materialization and a read-optimized query API.
analytics.architecture: Stream ingestion · Windowed processing · Columnar store · Query API · Streaming reactive UI

ai.title: AI-Assisted Operations Console
ai.summary: Internal console combining telemetry, runbooks and AI agents to accelerate operations and reduce MTTR.
ai.problem: Ops teams spending hours correlating logs, metrics and manual procedures.
ai.solution: Contextual signal aggregation, LLM-backed action recommendations and auditable runbook execution.
ai.architecture: Telemetry collector · Agent orchestrator · Policy layer · Sandboxed execution · Audit trail

about.title: Product engineering, from core to pixel.
about.p1: I work as a FullStack Developer focused on production systems: high-availability APIs, secure architectures, well-modeled databases and interfaces that turn complexity into clarity.
about.p2: I'm drawn to the point where engineering meets product — where architectural decisions set the ceiling for velocity, reliability and experience. I write code with intent, prioritize readability, and treat performance as a requirement, not a final tweak.
about.p3: I work well in uncertain territory: defining contracts, shaping data flows, hardening systems and shipping refined interfaces in the same cycle.

expertise.caption: Tools and domains that sustain serious systems in production.

contact.caption: Available for selected collaborations in product engineering.
contact.final: Engineering as craft. Product as purpose.
